description: The NOC is implementing automated self-healing for common alerts. A remediation playbook has been placed at ~/Desktop/remediation_playbook.txt. Read this playbook, create the three required shell scripts in /opt/remediation-scripts/ (make sure they are executable), and then configure the three corresponding 'Run Program' notification profiles in OpManager to trigger them. OpManager is accessible at http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
